behaviors.description: A static prompt-template lint check rejects phase-specific instruction leakage copied from SKILL.md.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is local lint logic over template text (MOCK-MISS: single function/object). No OS/network/subprocess requirement (REAL-INFRA: no). No model-output dependence (LLM-DEP: no). Rejected Integration because behavior text says "static prompt-template lint check," which disqualifies needing multi-module runtime wiring.
behaviors.test_description: Call the lint rule on representative prompt-template strings (clean vs leaked phase instructions copied from SKILL.md) and assert it rejects only leaked variants with precise error locations.

behaviors.description: The fully assembled prompt produced by the real test harness (after interpolation and fixtures) still contains no phase-instruction leakage.
behaviors.justification: Bug appears at module handoff: template + interpolation + fixture assembly (MOCK-MISS: yes, cross-module). No real external infra needed beyond in-process harness/fixtures; local filesystem fixtures are still Integration (REAL-INFRA: no System trigger). No LLM-output dependence (LLM-DEP: no). Rejected System because behavior text is about "fully assembled prompt" content, not HTTP/subprocess/OS-only effects.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real prompt-assembly path with production-like fixtures/interpolation and assert the final prompt text excludes phase-specific SKILL.md instructions.

behaviors.description: The test invocation loads skill context from plugin/skill files and validates behavior from that context rather than from hard-coded prompt rules.
behaviors.justification: Failure is wiring between loader, file-backed skill context, and invocation path (MOCK-MISS: module boundary). Uses local files, but no required real network/subprocess/OS primitive beyond normal file reads (REAL-INFRA: Integration). LLM content quality is not required for this specific behavior if validated via controlled doubles around invocation (LLM-DEP: not required by text). Rejected Agentic because behavior text focuses on source-of-truth loading ("loads skill context from plugin/skill files") rather than model judgment quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute invocation with real skill-file loading and verify the harness derives directives from file content (and not hard-coded prompt constants), e.g., by changing file content and observing invocation inputs change accordingly.

behaviors.description: The harness can run the same user-style prompt against an intentionally degraded or missing SKILL.md variant without changing test prompt text.
behaviors.justification: This is harness configurability across file variants and invocation setup (MOCK-MISS: multi-module configuration path). Local file variant switching is enough; no mandatory real network/subprocess behavior (REAL-INFRA: not System). No required LLM-quality assertion in this behavior itself (LLM-DEP: no). Rejected Agentic because behavior text is capability to "run" unchanged prompt across variants, not correctness of model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Parameterize harness with normal vs degraded/missing SKILL.md fixtures, keep identical user-style prompt text, and assert both runs execute through the same prompt template path with only skill-context source changed.

behaviors.description: When the relevant SKILL.md section is removed or degraded, the behavioral test fails under the same user-style prompt.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real model behavior changing with skill-context degradation (LLM-DEP: yes; AI-CALL-DEFAULT applies). Stubbed outputs would hide this regression (MOCK-HIDE: yes). Single model decision path, not necessarily multiple agentic stages (MULTI-STEP: no). Rejected Workflow because behavior text specifies one prompt/behavioral outcome comparison, not a multi-agentic pipeline.
behaviors.test_description: Run live-model behavioral smoke test twice (baseline skill vs degraded/removed section) with identical user-style prompt; assert baseline passes structural expectations and degraded variant fails those same assertions.

behaviors.description: Raw model output is captured to a diagnostic artifact before any JSON parsing or extraction logic runs.
behaviors.justification: Failure is ordering across model-call wrapper, artifact writer, and parser modules (MOCK-MISS: cross-module sequencing). Local artifact write can be tested in-process with temp filesystem; no required external OS/network/subprocess behavior beyond standard file I/O (REAL-INFRA: Integration). LLM-output quality not required; deterministic stub output suffices for ordering check (LLM-DEP: no). Rejected Agentic because behavior text is about capture timing ("before any JSON parsing"), not model decision quality.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke harness path with controlled model response, assert raw response artifact is persisted first, then parser executes; verify by timestamps/events or explicit call-order instrumentation plus artifact contents.

behaviors.description: Assertions enforce structural behavior constraints (for example schema paths and role-specific field placement), not only keyword presence checks.
behaviors.justification: Core failure boundary is assertion logic itself (schema/path/placement matcher) and can be proven with crafted outputs (MOCK-MISS: local logic). No real infra required (REAL-INFRA: no). No real model dependence required to verify matcher semantics (LLM-DEP: no). Rejected Integration because behavior text is about what assertions enforce, which is directly testable at assertion-function boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Feed assertion utilities deterministic sample outputs that pass keywords but violate schema/role placement; assert structural matcher fails these and passes structurally correct outputs.

behaviors.description: Under live model execution, structural assertions catch regressions that a keyword-only check would miss.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires live model execution and regression detection based on model-produced structure (LLM-DEP: yes; AI-CALL-DEFAULT yes). Mocking would often pass and hide true failures (MOCK-HIDE: yes). Not inherently multi-step agent pipeline (MULTI-STEP: no). Rejected Workflow because behavior text describes single live execution outcome comparison, not chained agentic stages.
behaviors.test_description: Execute live-model test with production prompt/context, evaluate output using both keyword-only and structural assertions, and confirm cases where keyword check passes but structural checks fail, surfacing real regression.
